meta.title: Logitaka — AI System for Task and Context Management
meta.description: Just say what's happening. Logitaka will figure it out, organize, remind, and tell you what to do next.

imagePlaceholders.hero: Optional: hero image about a person, system, and controlled chaos. Currently, the block acts as abstract visualization.

hero.headline: Speak your mind. Logitaka structures it.
hero.subheadline: The voice-first operating system for solopreneurs and knowledge workers. Dictate raw thoughts, tasks, or meeting minutes — Logitaka instantly structures them into clean tasks, calendar events, and project context.
supporting: A sharp, living, minimalist space without unnecessary visual noise.
One system for daily sessions, projects, decisions, and next steps.
Fast reasoning, context retention, desktop and mobile as equal modes.

visualCards.title: Raw Input
visualCards.body: Voice, text, notes, chat fragments, incomplete thoughts.

visualCards.title: Structured System
visualCards.body: Projects, tasks, decisions, plan, calendar, current real context.

visualCards.title: Movement
visualCards.body: The system doesn't just store. It leads further and keeps order alive.

problem.title: Recognize yourself in at least one.

items.title: Too many threads — only one head
items.body: Work projects, client agreements, team status, raw ideas. Everything is important, everything is urgent. It just doesn't fit.

items.title: Decisions vanish in chat archives
items.body: You agreed on a change during a call, but it was never documented. A week later, the context is lost.

items.title: Stuck at the start of the day
items.body: You have a mountain of ideas and feedback, but when you sit down to work, it's unclear what task to prioritize first.

items.title: Static plans die fast
items.body: You wrote a task list or spreadsheet. Three days later, project reality has shifted, and the plan is obsolete.

items.title: Drowning in administrative noise
items.body: You spend more time organizing, typing, and status checking than actually executing.

problem.closing: This isn't a willpower problem. This is a problem of lacking an active cognitive exoskeleton that holds your work context together.

transformation.title: How it works.
body: On first entry, Logitaka asks questions and listens. Based on what you tell — it automatically forms a structure: projects, tasks, decisions, plan, calendar.
The more you tell — the more accurately the system understands your situation.
Under the hood is a structured project engine that formats your thoughts into concrete action items, guided by seasoned project management methodologies.
transformation.coreBody: Under the hood is not just AI, but a structured engine that formats your thoughts into concrete plans. The system doesn't adapt to chaos, but guides you out of it. Works for you 24/7.
list: The more you tell — the clearer the system understands your reality.
Important fragments stop living separately and fold into a solid picture.
Decisions, plans, and next steps stop getting lost in the chaos of conversation.
The structure doesn't freeze. It continues to live and update with you.

capabilities.title: What the system does.

items.title: Voice-to-Structure & Express Meetings
items.body: Speak naturally. Whether it's a 15-second task or a 10-minute project dump, Logitaka automatically updates tasks, calendars, and decisions across all your projects at once.

items.title: Independent AI Critic (The Anti-Yes-Man)
items.body: Unlike traditional AI chats that simply agree with you, Logitaka employs an independent critic. It objectively reviews your project roadmap against international best practices, pointing out risks and blind spots.

items.title: Telegram Sync & Daily Briefs
items.body: Stay updated directly in your pocket. Get a daily text brief of your priorities, active risks, and even a customized comic strip visual of your daily schedule.

items.title: Focus Sessions & Pomodoro
items.body: Activate focus mode on any task. Logitaka breaks it down into subtasks, starting a Pomodoro timer and launching a context-aware AI partner by your side to help you execute.

capabilities.closing: You do the thinking. Logitaka maintains the order.

context.label: Live Context
context.title: Context that doesn't disappear.
body: A regular AI chat doesn't remember you between sessions. Logitaka works differently.

Every conversation is summarized and entered into the project context. Decisions are fixed separately. Plans are extracted automatically. You can return in a week — the system knows where you stopped.
Works with leading models — OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and others. You can switch between models — the context is shared and up-to-date.
context.closing: You think out loud. Logitaka turns it into a structure.

modelTeaser.title: 10+ Top AI Models. Pay Only for Real Complexity.
modelTeaser.subtitle: Why use a sledgehammer to crack a nut? Logitaka lets you use fast, cost-effective models for daily routines, saving heavyweights for truly complex challenges.
bullets: Smart defaults: cost-effective AI for 90% of tasks
Seamless switching: change models in one click
Transparent spending: always know what you pay for
modelTeaser.cta: Find the perfect AI setup for my role

audience.title: For anyone who has a lot of tasks.

items.title: Freelancer / designer / blogger
items.body: Clients, deadlines, ideas, messages — the system keeps everything in one place.

items.title: Manager / entrepreneur
items.body: Team, projects, decisions, control — without having to keep everything in your head.

items.title: Developer
items.body: Project context, decision history, tasks — plus direct integration with code editor.

items.title: Anyone with a large volume of tasks
items.body: It doesn't matter what you do. Zero entry barrier — just speak.

audience.closing: The entry barrier is zero. Anyone can handle it — just speak.

devTeam.label: Dev Team
devTeam.title: Operational layer around development.
body: Code is not the only place where context gets lost. Decisions disappear in chats. A week later, the team cannot restore why they did it exactly this way.
Logitaka fixes the history of decisions, the current state of the project, and next steps — in one place, always up-to-date.

For those working with AI assistants in code: discuss the task in Logitaka — with one action send ready instructions to the editor. Code is executed under your control, with verified instructions, without extra iterations.
points: Fewer switches between chat, code, and project memory.
Reasons for decisions don't disappear a day after discussion.
Next steps stay next to the real technical context.
AI coding remains under control, rather than turning into chaotic copying.

valueStack.label: Comparison
valueStack.title: What it would cost separately.
valueStack.subtitle: Accessing the same models directly would cost you several times more. Logitaka gives you everything — in one interface, for one subscription.

You will receive dedicated language models, integration with internal databases, SLA guarantees, and absolute control over your confidentiality.

items.question: What is Logitaka?
items.answer: Logitaka is a voice-first cognitive exoskeleton and project operating system designed for professionals who manage high cognitive loads. It takes raw, unstructured voice recordings or text notes and formats them into organized tasks, calendar events, and project roadmaps.

items.question: How does voice-to-structure work?
items.answer: It is simple: you press record and dictate your raw thoughts, project updates, or meeting minutes. Behind the scenes, Logitaka's structured engine processes the audio, extracts tasks and decisions, schedules deadlines, and updates your project space in seconds.

items.question: Who is Logitaka for?
items.answer: Logitaka is built specifically for Solopreneurs, Product Managers, Consultants, Tech Leads, and Deep Focus professionals who need to manage complex information streams and cannot afford to lose project context.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: We offer transparent pricing: Starter is $4.99/mo (includes voice assistant and 5 basic projects), PRO is $9.99/mo (includes full project history, discussions, and advanced model support), and Premium is $24.99/mo (includes AI strategist, critic reports, and team collaboration features).

items.question: How is my data protected?
items.answer: We prioritize privacy. All payments are securely processed via Lemon Squeezy, and we do not store your credit card information. For organizations with strict security requirements, we offer Custom On-Premise deployments with dedicated local models.

finalCta.label: Final CTA
finalCta.title: Speak your mind. Logitaka structures it.
finalCta.body: Start offloading your cognitive load. Logitaka is configured and ready for live use.
finalCta.notice: By signing up, you agree to the Terms of Use and acknowledge the Privacy Policy.

footer.tagline: The system keeps order — you just live.

s0.text: We have a Q2 team meeting tomorrow. Need to prepare an agenda and remind everyone by evening.
Task created: Prepare agenda — by tomorrow
I've scheduled the meeting and added the tasks. Should I send a reminder to the team today at 18:00, or choose another time?

s1.text: Client Art-Studio was supposed to send logo edits yesterday. Silence so far.
Logged: Waiting for edits from Art-Studio
Open issue: No response from client
Understood, project status updated. Should I remind you to write them if they don't reply by evening?

s2.text: We're migrating to a new server on Friday. Can't forget about environment variables and SSL.
Added deployment tasks. Would you like me to create a migration checklist so we don't miss anything on Friday?

questions: Did the client approve the new deadline?
Do we need a mobile version for this release?

decisions.text: Designer is delayed by a week — new deadline May 7.
Site structure: 5 pages, no blog in the first release.
Continuing with current designer, not looking for a new one.

history.title: Session 3.
history.text: Updated designer status. Added task to notify client. Logged 1 decision.

history.title: Session 2.
history.text: Timeline shifted. Discussed options — decided to keep current contractor. Logged 2 decisions.

history.title: Session 1.
history.text: Project launched. Approved 5-page structure, handed over brief.

hero.title:
Not all models are
equally necessary.
hero.description1: An expensive model doesn't mean it's the best for your tasks. It means it is optimized for specialized challenges that fall outside your daily workflow.
hero.description2: Logitaka is architected so that even budget-friendly models confidently handle complex tasks—because the system provides them with the precise context and clear instructions. Below are all the models operating within the system.

intro.title: 10 Models. Each in its place.
intro.description: You might not have encountered most of them. That does not mean they are inferior to the ones you know.

price.title: The price gap is massive.
price.description: No raw numbers—only the ratio. This illustrates the impact on your balance every time a model is selected without strategic intent.

matrix.title: Capabilities do not reflect price.
matrix.description: An evaluation of how each model performs on tasks that actually arise within Logitaka. These are not abstract benchmarks, but specific functional scenarios.

scenarios.title: Identifying the right model for you.
scenarios.description: Disregard marketing hype—choose based on functional requirements.

advisor.title: Model Selection Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Select your typical workflow, and we will demonstrate which models will cover 100% of your requirements without cost overruns.
advisor.footerNote: All models are available immediately. Switch at any moment.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Logitaka. The system that manages your affairs.

hero.title: Everything hidden under the hood.
hero.description: The home page shows the essence. Here is the full picture: technologies, comparisons, and personalized selections.

pro_details.title: Meeting & Express Meeting
pro_details.description: Voice-dump updates across all active projects. Logitaka's structured meetings walk you through project statuses, decisions, and tasks, making the entire workspace instantly actual.

pro_details.title: Discussion & Inbox
pro_details.description: Engage in deep discussions with your project context. Logitaka proactively extracts decisions, drafts next steps, and logs them during the conversation.

pro_details.title: Library & Chat Shelf
pro_details.description: Upload books, PDFs, and documents. Instead of simple storage, Logitaka indexes and summarizes all files, making them immediately retrievable and searchable.

pro_details.title: 10 Full Projects & Archive
pro_details.description: Organize different client streams, business ideas, and research workspaces, archiving completed projects to keep your workspace tidy.

pro_details.title: Global Search
pro_details.description: Query your entire workspace history instantly. Find dates, past decisions, client agreements, or task records across active and archived folders.

pro_details.title: All Top AI Models Worldwide
pro_details.description: Seamlessly utilize Claude, GPT, and Gemini. Logitaka automatically routes your tasks to match the optimal model size, saving budget on routine while employing heavyweights for deep reasoning.

premium_details.title: Independent AI Analytics (Critic)
premium_details.description: Objective project health check. An AI critic with a custom non-pleasing prompt audits your roadmap against global standards, identifying actual risks and reference pathways.

premium_details.title: Personal AI Profiler
premium_details.description: A psychological and skill-based profile of the user. Logitaka compiles your preferences and strength areas, blending it into prompts to make agents truly understand you.

premium_details.title: AI Strategist Insights
premium_details.description: Proactive cards showing highly tailored insights and concrete steps to take, generated by comparing your project state and user profile.

premium_details.title: DevTeam GitHub Sync
premium_details.description: Connect project context directly with code. Discuss tasks in Logitaka and export verified instructions to code editors, sync commits, and track repository dependencies.

premium_details.title: Team & Calendar delegation
premium_details.description: Create team profiles, assign tasks, and delegate deadlines. Sync events directly to their external Google/Apple calendars even if they are not in the system.

premium_details.title: Unlimited Projects
premium_details.description: Zero workspace constraints. Run as many independent projects, documents, libraries, and context memories as your operations require.
